R0214.title: Digital Avatar Deepfake
R0214.definition: Attackers use AI technology to clone others' appearance and voice to create digital avatars for fraud, impersonation or personality rights infringement.

references.title: Building a strong security barrier for digital humans
Coalition for Content Provenance and Authenticity (C2PA)

R0214.description: Attackers use AI technology to clone others' appearance and voice to create digital avatars for fraud, impersonation or personality rights infringement.
R0214.influence: May cause business abuse, data exposure, financial loss, compliance impact, or supply-chain propagation.
